heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly cloudy south, and in the northeast; partly cloudy elsewhere north  Highs in the upper 40s to lower 50s, except mid 50s in the Champlain Valley, and upper 50s in the St. Lawrence Valley. South to southeast winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. Chance of a rain or snow shower, then a rising chance late north of Route 2. Lows in the low to mid 30s, some upper 30s in the broad valleys west. South winds around 5 mph, becoming northwest late.

heading: Thursday
text: Decreasing clouds; a morning sprinkle or flurry possible east of the Greens. Highs in the low to mid 50s, with some upper 40s northeast, and some upper 50s in far southern valleys, and in the St. Lawrence Valley. Northwest winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
